Name: NWP Gold Panners – Mwinilunga Pan Batch #001 – 42.3 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 42.3 grams alluvial gold (purity ~92% Au after panning and mercury-free gravity concentration) from Mwinilunga gold panning area, North-Western Province. Panner: Chanda Samusata (ID NWP-GP-0012). MMMD artisanal panning permit APP-NWP-2025-0034. ZRA royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0034. Environmental monitoring – no mercury used (ZEMA-AUG-2025-0012).

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Ikelenge River Batch #002 – 68.7 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 68.7 g alluvial gold (90–93% Au) from Ikelenge River gold panning. Panner: Mrs. Florence Kanyama (ID NWP-GP-0034). Mercury-free mercury-free gravity sluice used. MMMD artisanal permit APP-NWP-2025-0045. ZRA royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0045. Gold sold to Zambia Gold Company Ltd at LME spot minus 8%.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Zambezi Headwaters Batch #003 – 31.5 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 31.5 g alluvial gold from Zambezi headwaters area, near Mwinilunga. Panner: Mr. Patrick Ndubula (ID NWP-GP-0056). MMMD permit APP-NWP-2025-0056. Purity 91% Au. ZRA royalty paid ROY-AUG-2025-0056. Gravity panning only, mercury-free certification MF-2025-0012.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Kabompo River Batch #004 – 55.2 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 55.2 g alluvial gold (92% Au) from Kabompo River artisanal panning area. Panner: Mr. Gift Moonde (ID NWP-GP-0067). MMMD permit APP-NWP-2025-0067. Assay by Zambia Consolidated Copper Mines Investment Holdings laboratory ZCC-LAB-2025-0034. ZRA royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0067.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Jimbe River Batch #005 – 22.8 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 22.8 g alluvial gold from Jimbe River headwaters, North-Western Province. Panner: Ms. Alice Chipango (ID NWP-GP-0078). Mercury-free gravity sluice. MMMD APP-NWP-2025-0078. ZEMA environmental monitoring report EMA-2025-0023. ZRA royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0078.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Mwinilunga Cooperative Pan Batch #006 – 89.4 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 89.4 g alluvial gold from cooperative group panning (6 panners, 2-week session). MMMD group permit APP-NWP-2025-0089. Purity 91.5% Au. Gold assay by Lusaka Assay Office LAO-2025-0045. ZRA royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0089. Sold to Zambia Gold Company at LME minus 7%.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Lunga River Batch #007 – 47.6 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 47.6 g alluvial gold from Lunga River panning, North-Western/Copperbelt border area. Panner: Mr. Samuel Musunga (ID NWP-GP-0101). MMMD APP-NWP-2025-0101. Mercury-free gravity separation, purity 90.2%. ZRA royalty paid ROY-AUG-2025-0101.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Ikelenge Cooperative Pan Batch #008 – 116.2 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 116.2 g gold from Ikelenge cooperative (8 panners, 3-week session). MMMD group permit APP-NWP-2025-0112. Purity 92.4% Au. Lusaka Assay Office LAO-2025-0056. ZRA royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0112. Fair trade premium paid to cooperative ZMW 4,800.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Zambezi River Batch #009 – 36.9 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 36.9 g alluvial gold from upper Zambezi River panning area, near Chavuma. Panner: Mr. Isaac Likando (ID NWP-GP-0123). MMMD APP-NWP-2025-0123. Purity 90.8% Au, no mercury used (ZEMA cert MF-2025-0034). ZRA royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0123.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Mwinilunga Pan Batch #010 – 74.5 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 74.5 g alluvial gold from Mwinilunga main panning area (seasonal high-water deposition). MMMD APP-NWP-2025-0134. Purity 92% Au. Assay by ZCCM-IH laboratory. ZRA royalty paid ROY-AUG-2025-0134. Gold exported via Zambia Gold Company for London Bullion Market delivery.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Kabompo Pan Batch #011 – 51.3 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 51.3 g alluvial gold (91.8% Au) from Kabompo River dry-season panning. MMMD APP-NWP-2025-0145. ZRA royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0145. Gravity separation, no mercury. ZEMA cert MF-2025-0045. Gold sold to Zambia Gold Company Ltd at ZMW 2,604/g spot equivalent.

Name: NWP Gold Panners – Ikelenge End-Season Pan Batch #012 – 93.1 g Alluvial Gold
Description: 93.1 g alluvial gold from Ikelenge end-of-wet-season panning batch. MMMD APP-NWP-2025-0156. Purity 91.2% Au. Lusaka Assay Office LAO-2025-0078. ZRA royalty paid ROY-AUG-2025-0156. Mercury-free gravity concentration, ZEMA compliance report EMA-2025-0056.

Name: ASM Gold Panning Claim – Mwinilunga River Zone MGP-A001 – 0.8 ha
Description: Registered alluvial gold panning claim MGP-A001, Mwinilunga River, North-Western Province. 0.8 hectares of riverbank alluvial workings. Minerals licensed: gold, silver. MMMD licence SMML-NWP-2025-0045. Environmental clearance ZEMA-ECL-2025-0078. Water use permit WARMA-WU-2025-0045. Community consent from Chief Sailung.

Name: ASM Gold Panning Claim – Ikelenge River Zone IGP-B002 – 0.6 ha
Description: Alluvial panning claim IGP-B002, Ikelenge River, North-Western Province. 0.6 ha. Gold. MMMD SMML-NWP-2025-0056. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0089. WARMA WU-2025-0056. Community consent Chief Ikelenge. Annual renewal fee paid ZMW 30,000. Rehabilitation fund contribution ZMW 8,000/year.

Name: ASM Gold Panning Claim – Kabompo River Zone KGP-C003 – 1.1 ha
Description: Panning claim KGP-C003, Kabompo River, North-Western Province. 1.1 ha alluvial gold workings. MMMD SMML-NWP-2025-0067. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0102. WARMA seasonal panning permit valid June–Oct. Community chief Mwinilunga area consent. ZRA royalty agreement RA-AUG-2025-0045.

Name: ASM Gold Panning Claim – Zambezi Headwaters Zone ZGP-D004 – 0.7 ha
Description: Panning claim ZGP-D004, Upper Zambezi, Chavuma District, North-Western Province. 0.7 ha. MMMD SMML-NWP-2025-0078. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0112. Special WARMA Zambezi source protection zone permit. Community consent Chief Chavuma. Annual renewal fee ZMW 35,000.

Name: ASM Gold Panning Claim – Lunga River Zone LGP-E005 – 0.9 ha
Description: Panning claim LGP-E005, Lunga River, NW/Copperbelt boundary. 0.9 ha. MMMD SMML-NWP-2025-0089. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0123. WARMA WU-2025-0078. Annual claim fee ZMW 40,500 paid. Mercury-free operations compliance certificate MF-2025-0056.

Name: ASM Gold Panning Claim – Jimbe River Zone JGP-F006 – 0.5 ha
Description: Panning claim JGP-F006, Jimbe River, Mwinilunga District. 0.5 ha. MMMD SMML-NWP-2025-0101. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0134. WARMA seasonal permit. Women's panning group (12 women) registered as right holders. Annual fee ZMW 22,500. Mercury-free cert MF-2025-0067.

Name: ASM Gold Panning Claim – Mutanda River Zone MGR-G007 – 1.2 ha
Description: Panning claim MGR-G007, Mutanda River, Solwezi District, North-Western Province. 1.2 ha alluvial gold. MMMD SMML-NWP-2025-0112. ZEMA-ECL-2025-0145. WARMA WU-2025-0089. Community consent Chief Mukumbi. ZRA royalty agreement RA-AUG-2025-0078. Annual fee ZMW 54,000.

Name: Mineral Royalty Token – ZRA Gold Q1 2025 – ZMW 54,480
Description: Mineral royalty payment for Q1 2025 artisanal gold production by North-Western Province Gold Panners Association. Royalty rate 6% of gross gold sales (Mines and Minerals Development Act s.87). ZRA receipt MR-AUG-2025-Q1-0045. Covers Mwinilunga, Ikelenge, Kabompo batches. Amount: ZMW 54,480.

Name: Mineral Royalty Token – ZRA Gold Q2 2025 – ZMW 76,320
Description: Q2 2025 gold royalty payment to ZRA. 6% of gross sales of 488.2g gold. ZRA receipt MR-AUG-2025-Q2-0056. Covers all panners in the association, batches #004 through #008. MMMD production returns MPR-Q2-2025-0078 attached. Amount: ZMW 76,320.

Name: Mineral Royalty Token – ZRA Gold Q3 2025 – ZMW 88,560
Description: Q3 2025 gold royalty to ZRA. 6% on 565.3g gold sales (batches #009 to #011). ZRA receipt MR-AUG-2025-Q3-0067. MMMD returns MPR-Q3-2025-0089 attached. Amount: ZMW 88,560. Zambia Gold Company off-take agreement delivery confirmation attached.

Name: Mineral Royalty Token – ZRA Gold Q4 2025 – ZMW 62,964
Description: Q4 2025 gold royalty to ZRA. 6% on 402.4g gold sales (Ikelenge end-season batch #012 and others). ZRA receipt MR-AUG-2025-Q4-0078. MMMD production returns MPR-Q4-2025-0101 attached. Amount: ZMW 62,964.

Name: Mineral Royalty Token – WARMA Water Use Fee 2025 – ZMW 18,000
Description: Annual 2025 water use fee paid to Water Resources Management Authority (WARMA) for artisanal gold panning operations across 7 river-section claims. WARMA invoice WUF-2025-0045. Fee computed at ZMW 18,000 (flat rate for cooperative). Receipt WARMA-REC-2025-0045.

Name: Mineral Royalty Token – MMMD Annual Panning Levy 2025 – ZMW 28,500
Description: Annual panning rights levy paid to Ministry of Mines and Minerals Development for 2025 season. Covers all 7 registered panning claims of the North-Western Province Gold Panners Association. MMMD invoice MMMD-APL-2025-0034. Receipt MMMD-REC-2025-0034. Amount: ZMW 28,500.
